title: Good Boy - Bitesize Chicken Bites - Dog Training Treats - Made with Over 50% Natural Meat - 65 g ℮ - Low Fat Dog Treats - Case of 10
features: MADE with OVER 50 Percent NATURAL MEAT: I’m made with natural meat so am sure to get your dogs’ tail wagging. Not only that, I'm delicately oven baked creating the tasty bitesize treat for rewarding your pooch at home or whilst out and about
LOW FAT DOG TREATS: I’m low in fat meaning that I'm the perfect addition to your dogs' well balanced diet. My fat content means I'm a great snack for all occasions
RAWHIDE FREE TREATS: I contain absolutely no rawhide, am ridiculously yummy, super-duper high quality and will keep your dog happy as well as entertained

DOG TRAINING TREATS: I’m the perfect treat for small dogs but also make a fantastic reward for training larger dogs too. My size means I'm small, but mighty, and am super helpful when training dogs of all sizes, breeds and puppies over 4 months. I am approximately 15 mm x 10 mm in size - a perfect size for chewing fun
RESEALABLE PACKAGING: I’m lovingly packed in a handy, resealable bag for ease of use and storage. Store me safely in your cupboards at home or pop me in your bag for walkies
description: From the manufacturer We know just how important it is to feed your dog the right treats for their size, age and breed. We also know how important treats are for making your dog super happy. So here at Good Boy we have a huge range of dog treats in all different shapes, flavours and sizes to suit every occasion of treating your dog. Why are Real Meat Treats so Paw-some? Our dogs are our family and we all love to reward them for generally just being cute and lovable. What better way to treat our doggies than with deliciously natural and ridiculously tasty real meat treats? With low fat, high protein and grain free choices available in a range of shapes and sizes - you're bound to find your pooch's perfect treat. Each variety and flavour of our real meat treats are roasted in their natural juices to keep that delicious meaty flavour – meaning they’re super scrummy, nutritious and wholesome. Meaty Twists Meaty Bites Meaty Fillets Meaty Sticks Mega Chews Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 3,676 4.7 out of 5 stars 3,676 4.7 out of 5 stars 3,676 4.7 out of 5 stars 7,734 4.7 out of 5 stars 7,734 Available in these tasty flavours Chicken Twists, Jumbo Chicken Twists, Duck Twists Chicken & Calcium Bones, Chicken & Rice Bones, Chicken Dumbbells, Chicken Bites, Duck Bites, Beef Bites, Pigs in Blankets Chicken Fillets, Chicken Strips, Beef Fillets, Duck Fillets, Lamb Fillets, Venison Steaks, Lamb Strips Chicken & Carrot Sticks, Duck & Carrot Sticks, Chicken & Sweet Potato Sticks, Chicken & Cheese Sticks Mega Chicken Twist, Mega Duck Twist, Mega Chicken & Carrot Stick Find your real meat favourites: Super yummy real meat wrapped around a chewy rawhide centre Smaller bites, which are loved by smaller dogs or as training treats Feed whole for a chewy meat treat, or break into smaller pieces for training treats Meaty favourites without rawhide for more sensitive tummies Bigger chews to keep your dog busy for longer Love these real meat treats? Find more favourites from Good Boy... Longer-Lasting Treats With tasty natural treats like whole pigs ears, natural rawhide shapes, or rawhide-alternative chews for all sizes of dogs - these treats are great for satisfying your dog's chewing instincts for longer. Natural Dental Treats Keep your dog's gnashers in tip-top condition with a daily dental chew. Dental dog treats promote teeth health, so they'll be grinning with delight! Tasty Reward Treats Ridiculously tasty, instant gratification treats are a great way to reward your pooch! Not only are our reward treats delicious, they’re nutritious too, made with natural meats and some even packed full of scrummy superfoods!
